programs.title: Bushwhacked
programs.desc: Kayne and Kamil are heading to the Apple Island in the name of platypus population research, and to uncover a little known dangerous characteristic of this popular species.

programs.title: Motown Magic
programs.sub_title: Higher Ground And Living For The City
programs.desc: Imaginative boy Ben transforms his city by bringing colourful street art to life, armed with a magic paintbrush and the classic sounds of Motown.

programs.title: The Magic Canoe
programs.desc: Nico has a bad cold and cannot participate in the fun adventure. In the end, he realizes that imagination is a wonderful power that he can use whenever he wants!

programs.title: Spartakus And The Sun Beneath The Sea
programs.desc: Spartakus has led Tehrig to a disreputable town, hoping to find his friend Quillsinger, the bad boy poet.

programs.title: The World According To Grandpa
programs.desc: Poppy asks why bees make honey, so Grandpa spins a tale about a time when the world suddenly stopped turning.

programs.title: Chums
programs.desc: Flies With Eagles wants to make her ribbon skirt on her own, and the chums try to help her finish it in time for the big pow wow.
